'''鈭歨-l-d-s''' ('''kahaldesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cudgel|cudgel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cudgel|cudgel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-l-d-s
|-
! Lemma
| kahaldesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihaldesoko|thihaldesoko]] || [[word:jihaldesoko|jihaldesoko]] || [[word:shihaldesoko|shihaldesoko]] || [[word:kihaldesoko|kihaldesoko]]
